mapper.select: SELECT mv.id, m.challenge_id AS challengeId, 'MEETING_ATTENDANCE' AS type, m.title AS title, m.description AS description, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(36)) AS targetId, mv.meeting_id AS meetingId, mv.status, m.created_by AS createdBy, mv.expires_at AS deadline, mv.created_at AS createdAt, mv.closed_at AS completedAt, mv.required_count AS requiredCount FROM woorido.meeting_votes mv JOIN woorido.meetings m ON mv.meeting_id = m.id WHERE mv.id = #{id}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.meeting_vote_records WHERE meeting_vote_id = #{voteId} AND choice = 'AGREE') AS AGREE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.meeting_vote_records WHERE meeting_vote_id = #{voteId} AND choice = 'DISAGREE') AS DISAGREE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.meeting_vote_records WHERE meeting_vote_id = #{voteId}) AS TOTAL FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.meeting_votes SET status = #{status}, closed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{voteId}
UPDATE woorido.meeting_votes SET status = 'EXPIRED', closed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < SYSTIMESTAMP
